user.title: Sifely Account Login
user.description: Enter your Sifely account credentials to connect your smart locks.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Sifely API

list_passcodes.name: List passcodes
list_passcodes.description: Retrieves the list of passcodes for a lock.

lock_id.name: Lock ID
lock_id.description: The unique identifier of the lock.

add_passcode.name: Add passcode
add_passcode.description: Adds a keyboard passcode to a lock.

lock_id.name: Lock ID
lock_id.description: The unique identifier of the lock.

keyboard_pwd.name: Passcode
keyboard_pwd.description: The passcode value (digits only, for example "1234").

keyboard_pwd_name.name: Passcode name
keyboard_pwd_name.description: A friendly name for the passcode.

start_date.name: Start date
start_date.description: The passcode validity start time as a millisecond timestamp.

end_date.name: End date
end_date.description: The passcode validity end time as a millisecond timestamp.

keyboard_pwd_type.name: Passcode type
keyboard_pwd_type.description: The passcode type: 1 = one-time, 2 = permanent, 3 = timed.

add_type.name: Add type
add_type.description: How the passcode is added: 1 = Bluetooth, 2 = gateway/Wi-Fi remote, 3 = NB-IoT.

delete_passcode.name: Delete passcode
delete_passcode.description: Deletes a keyboard passcode from a lock.

lock_id.name: Lock ID
lock_id.description: The unique identifier of the lock.

keyboard_pwd_id.name: Passcode ID
keyboard_pwd_id.description: The ID of the passcode to delete, obtained from the passcode list.

delete_type.name: Delete type
delete_type.description: How the passcode is deleted: 1 = Bluetooth, 2 = gateway/Wi-Fi remote, 3 = NB-IoT.
